prompt: Create a nostalgic travel postcard-style flat lay on a soft beige linen cloth, warm morning sunlight with gentle shadows, romantic rose-garden theme. The main object is a large square instant-photo print with a thick white border, placed slightly tilted on the left; inside the photo is an outdoor breakfast table in a lush rose garden with pink rose bushes, distant green hills, and a softly blurred dreamy background. The breakfast scene contains exactly 7 visible food/table elements: a red patterned teacup filled with black coffee on a matching saucer, a white plate, two slices of toast, one peeled banana half, one round bread roll or macaron-like bun, a small pile of nuts or cereal grains, and a glass bowl with pale fruit topped with dark jam and a small green herb sprig. Around the main photo are travel keepsakes: at upper right, a wicker basket partially visible holding large pink roses and dark green leaves, tied with a dusty pink satin ribbon; at right center, a smaller vintage postcard angled under the main photo showing a European hill village and the title Jardin de la Rose, with printed location text “SAINT-CIRQ-LAPOPIE” and “FRANCE” plus a circular postal stamp; at lower left, a torn handmade note card with pink handwritten Japanese text まだ見ぬ景色と、心ときめく瞬間を探しにいこう。♡; at bottom, a translucent rose-pink gel pen lies diagonally; near the bottom center is a small gold keychain charm shaped like a pink rose with green leaves; at lower right, a partially cropped pink ticket reading “ROSERAIE DE L'HAY” and “ENTREE”. Add exactly 3 loose pale rose petals on the linen. Use soft pastel colors, realistic paper textures, slight film grain, shallow depth of field, delicate highlights, and a cozy handwritten postcard mood. No people, no modern electronics, no watermark. Overall composition should feel like a rose garden travel memory from France.
